componentName.description:
Name of the web component to be rendered in this route
It defaults to the same package folder name

componentPath.description:
Path to the component file. It must be RELATIVE to the package, not the whole repo
It defaults to `./{package}/{componentName}.ts`

localize.description:
Defaults to true. It'll prepend a localization string at the beginning of the path
i.e. /en/my-path from /my-path

path.description: Path that will render our component

publicPage.description: If true, the path will be added to the public-app

redirect.description: This route is a redirect to this path

routes.description: define pages in public-app or auth-app
